executive_summary: On April 16 2026 equities grind to fresh all-time highs while the consumer Fear & Greed reads Extreme Fear (23) — a rare divergence that historically favours patient buyers; best risk-adjusted opportunities are Visa/MA/QCOM (near 52-week lows), TSMC (confirmed +50% earnings beat today), and a selective 15% crypto allocation in ETH + BTC-DCA on the Goldman ETF catalyst.

macro_environment.summary: Mixed macro: record SPY (RSI 72.9) contrasts with VIX 18.17 and Fear & Greed 23 (Extreme Fear), suggesting institutional vs retail divergence. The dominant binary risk is a potential US-Iran diplomatic announcement which would sharply move oil, gold, and energy stocks.

PPI rose less than expected in March — dovish Fed narrative intact, no May hike expected
Goldman Sachs launches Bitcoin Income ETF — major institutional crypto gateway opens
TSMC Q1 2026 confirmed +50% profit beat today (9th consecutive record quarter)
Trump again threatens to fire Fed Chair Powell — adds policy-rate uncertainty to valuations
